zenodo_metadata_draft.description: Lightweight data and code deposit supporting a DEM-derived voxel-topology study of gas-driven fine-debris transport and retention in Li4SiO4 ceramic breeder pebble beds. The deposit contains manuscript source, processed source data, figure-generation scripts, exported figures, supplementary material, metadata audits, and shared DEM post-processing, voxel-topology and transport analysis utilities. Large raw DEM dump/restart files are documented as optional raw-archive material and may be deposited separately if repository size limits require it.
zenodo_metadata_draft.license: GitHub-Zenodo archived public repository for manuscript review and reuse

notes.scientific_scope: Bounded DEM-derived voxel-topology study of pre-clogging migration, retention and pore-network response.
notes.raw_data_boundary: Large DEM dump/restart files can be archived separately when repository size limits require it.

license_options_to_confirm: CC-BY-4.0 for data/figures if authors want a permissive attribution data license
MIT or BSD-3-Clause for reusable code if a separate software license is desired
A single repository-level license chosen by the corresponding author or institution
